title: Fix f3-2's two judged failures: product-root resolution (G13) and the three-layer anti-fork gate (G14)
action: An independent judge broke cell f3-2's shipped gate four ways and found a second class it never considered. Both fixes here; the judge's exact reproductions are the acceptance tests. PART A — G13 PRODUCT ROOT: scribingTarget joins docs/specs off `root` (knowledge.mjs ~:840) and bundleMode resolves bundleDir(root) (~:746), while every other product-doc consumer routes through resolveProductRoot — inject.mjs:71, backlog.mjs:19/266, hooks/bee-session-close.mjs:110-118. DECISION G13: docs/knowledge/ IS a product-doc tree exactly like docs/specs/, so BOTH must resolve through resolveProductRoot. In the supported repo-divorce topology (config product_root, GH #14) a migrated host is currently graded bundle-less and its fallback points at the empty workshop docs/specs — the silent-rot class this work exists to prevent. Add a fixture in the DIVORCED topology; all three existing fixtures are single-root and structurally cannot see this. PART B — G14 THREE-LAYER ANTI-FORK. The judge defeated the current exact-normalized match with: (1) a trailing period ('billing: refunds and reversals.') -> new-concept beside the owner; (2) a Cyrillic-e homoglyph -> new-concept; (3) authoritative_for as an ARRAY -> invisible because knowledge.mjs:851 does typeof!=='string' -> continue; (4) an empty/whitespace/null/undefined subject -> the gate is skipped entirely at :846 and routes to overview.md EVEN WITH intent 'new-concept'. Also: two pre-existing owners of one subject resolve to the FIRST by walk order (break at :859) with no detection. Fix in three layers, because exact string matching on free text can never be sufficient: LAYER 1 harden the match — NFKC-normalize, strip trailing/leading punctuation, collapse internal whitespace. LAYER 2 fail closed — a non-string authoritative_for is a VALIDATION ERROR naming the file, never a silent skip; an empty/whitespace/null subject with intent 'new-concept' is REFUSED (a new action value, e.g. 'subject_required'), never routed to overview.md; keep the documented intents failing SAFE to update-concept as they already do. LAYER 3 make the backstop bite — duplicate_authoritative_for is promoted from a profile WARNING to a finding that FAILS the chain, because layer 1 can never catch a genuine paraphrase ('refunds and reversals' vs 'reversals and refunds') and the current backstop never blocks (run_verify runs `knowledge check` without --strict). Verify the live bundle has zero duplicates BEFORE promoting, or the chain goes red on existing content. RED-FIRST: every one of the judge's four defeats plus the duplicate-owner case and the divorced-topology case, captured red before implementing.

truths: red evidence: all four judge defeats + duplicate-owner + divorced-topology reproduced RED before the fix (verbatim)
trailing punctuation, homoglyph, array-valued claim and empty/null subject ALL now denied or refused — each demonstrated
two concepts claiming one subject is DETECTED, not silently first-wins — demonstrated
duplicate_authoritative_for now FAILS the chain; the live bundle verified duplicate-free first so the promotion does not red existing content
a DIVORCED-topology fixture proves bundleMode and scribingTarget resolve the product root, not the workshop root
the fallback still emits exactly its current key set with no bundle mention (do not regress f3-2's proven guarantee)
prohibitions: never let a malformed authoritative_for be silently skipped — it is an error
never route an empty-subject new-concept request to overview.md
never promote the duplicate finding without first proving the live bundle is clean
do not weaken any assertion f3-2 shipped — extend them
do not add the docs/specs read-only guard here — the next cell owns it

trace.outcome: G13 product-root resolution + G14 three-layer anti-fork gate: all six judge reproductions red-first, then fixed; duplicate_authoritative_for promoted to chain-failing on a proven-clean live bundle
deviations: Edited two files outside the cell's `files` list, both required to make LAYER 3 actually reach the chain: skills/bee-hive/templates/bee.mjs (+ its propagated .bee/bin/bee.mjs) so `knowledge check` prints and exits on the new profile.errors bucket, and scripts/okf_migrate.mjs so the F12 coverage gate keeps seeing duplicate_authoritative_for after it moved out of profile.warnings. Without the second edit the promotion would have silently REMOVED the code from the migration coverage gate.

The judge's defeat #3 was specified as 'a non-string authoritative_for'. Measured against the D12 parser, the shapes a real file can actually produce are: list, boolean, empty string, blank string. `42` and `null` parse as the STRINGS "42"/"null" (odd subjects, but readable ones), and a mapping is already an OKF `unparseable_frontmatter` error before this code runs. The tests were corrected to that measured set rather than asserting an unreachable 'number' case — the runtime guard still fails closed on typeof number/null defensively.

LAYER 1 required more than the cell's literal 'NFKC-normalize, strip punctuation, collapse whitespace': NFKC does NOT fold cross-script homoglyphs, so a bounded Cyrillic/Greek confusable table (UTS #39 skeleton) was added. Without it the judge's Cyrillic-e defeat would have stayed open despite following the letter of the instruction.

LAYER 3's duplicate grouping keys on the HARDENED skeleton rather than the raw string — strictly stronger than 'promote the existing finding'. Verified safe first: the live bundle is duplicate-free under the hardened grouping too, not only under exact-string.

`docs/specs/okf-profile.md` §B1/§B2 were rewritten to document the new severity (profile errors vs profile warnings) and the two codes in it. The docs/specs read-only guard is untouched — the next cell owns it.
